title: játszótérdoki.hu
description: Portfolio page for a hungarian company specified in renovating, repairing children's playground.
extended_description: Corporate website focused on trust, services, and contact conversion for a specialized Hungarian playground renovation company.
architecture: SvelteKit-based frontend with reusable UI primitives.
Structured content sections tuned for local business conversion.
Responsive image-first layout optimized for trust and credibility.
features: Service overview and portfolio-style content sections.
Strong mobile readability and contact-focused information hierarchy.
Clean visual tone aligned with service-company branding.

timeline.details: Defined page architecture and content order based on business goals.
Completed responsive implementation and visual finishing.

challenges: Balancing a professional tone with engaging visuals.
Presenting service offerings clearly without overwhelming users.
lessonsLearned: Simple content hierarchy often outperforms heavy visual complexity.
Local business sites benefit from fast trust signaling above the fold.

title: screenie
description: share your screenshots and videos easily (originally hypixel.lol)
extended_description: A ShareX screenshot uploader with domain management, user management, Spotify now playing integration, and public profile customization.
architecture: SvelteKit frontend layered over Appwrite-backed data and auth.
Role-aware dashboards with admin and user-specific capabilities.
Media and metadata workflow designed for quick share and retrieval.
features: ShareX upload compatibility and customizable user spaces.
Admin management tools for users, archives, and domains.
Public profile support with integrated dynamic content.

timeline.details: Rebuilt legacy service into a modern SvelteKit/Appwrite stack.
Introduced richer admin tooling and profile customization.

challenges: Keeping upload flows fast while adding richer account features.
Ensuring stable permissions across user and admin capabilities.
lessonsLearned: Good information architecture is critical for dashboard products.
Incremental migration from legacy systems reduces product risk.

title: hypixel.lol
description: ShareX image uploader service, with Discord user integration!
extended_description: Legacy version of screenie, built with NodeJS and Bootstrap, focused on fast image-sharing utility workflows.
architecture: NodeJS backend handling upload and account operations.
Bootstrap-driven frontend for utility-first workflows.
Discord-aware user integration for account linking.
features: Fast image uploads for ShareX users.
Domain and webhook settings management.
User-oriented controls for personalization and linking.

timeline.details: Shipped as a practical ShareX hosting utility.
Served as foundation for the screenie rewrite.

challenges: Maintaining old architecture while expanding feature requests.
Balancing UX improvements with legacy constraints.
lessonsLearned: Early architecture decisions strongly shape long-term maintainability.
Product rewrites are easier with clear migration boundaries.

title: cleangoogle.lol
extended_description: A lightweight search launcher with dark/light mode, weather, quotes, and utility widgets wrapped in a minimalist UI.
architecture: Static frontend focused on speed and simplicity.
Search query forwarding pipeline with utility widgets.
Theme-aware layout supporting user personalization.
features: Instant Google query redirection.
Theme toggle and lightweight personalization settings.
Weather and quote widgets on initial load.

timeline.details: Built as a minimal launcher concept.

challenges: Keeping utility features useful without cluttering the interface.
lessonsLearned: Minimal products still require deliberate visual hierarchy.

title: shortify!
extended_description: A compact NodeJS URL shortener that maps generated hashes to destination URLs with quick redirect handling.
architecture: NodeJS service generating and resolving short URL hashes.
Simple Bootstrap interface for create-and-copy workflow.
features: Hash generation for shortened URLs.
Fast redirect flow for destination links.
Simple interaction model for quick usage.

timeline.details: Implemented core short-link generation and redirect logic.

challenges: Ensuring URL validation remains robust in a minimal codebase.
lessonsLearned: Simple utilities are great opportunities to refine backend fundamentals.

title: spotnow
description: User profile page with Spotify integration.
extended_description: NodeJS-based profile page that pulls current playback state from Spotify and renders it in real time.
architecture: NodeJS backend handling Spotify API access and refresh flow.
Server-rendered views for low-overhead status display.
Focused integration design around now-playing updates.
features: Live Spotify now-playing information.
Profile-style presentation for personal status display.
Simple deployment footprint.

timeline.details: Implemented OAuth flow and playback endpoint handling.

challenges: Managing token refresh and playback state consistency.
lessonsLearned: External API reliability depends heavily on robust fallback states.

title: SnapScrape
description: Get your saved chat from Snapchat.
extended_description: NodeJS utility that transforms Snapchat JSON exports into a readable conversation-style interface.
architecture: Parser layer transforming exported JSON into structured chat messages.
Bootstrap frontend with emphasis on readability.
features: Snapshot export transformation into readable chat timeline.
Simple UI for quick review of large conversation history.

timeline.details: Implemented JSON parsing and chat layout generation.

challenges: Normalizing inconsistent exported data shape from third-party source.
lessonsLearned: Data normalization should be explicit before rendering layers are built.

title: Molnár Cukrászda
description: Molnár Cukrászda is a fictitious online bakery, a culmination project showcasing pastries and cakes in a digital space.
extended_description: School project focused on frontend implementation and ecommerce-like content presentation.
architecture: Bootstrap-based frontend-only implementation.
Catalog-style layout structure for bakery products.
features: Branded landing sections and product presentation.
Responsive foundation for school project requirements.
challenges: Balancing branding visuals with simple maintainable markup.
lessonsLearned: Strong layout fundamentals improve even early-stage projects.

title: Molnár Cukrászda v2
description: This is a rewritten version of Molnár Cukrászda, including complete PHP and SQL.
extended_description: Second iteration introducing server-side rendering, SQL persistence, and a more complete dynamic application flow.
architecture: PHP backend with SQL-backed persistence.
Bootstrap frontend connected to dynamic data model.
CRUD-like flows for content-driven pages.
features: Dynamic server-rendered pages.
Database-backed content management capabilities.
Expanded full-stack project scope over v1.

timeline.details: Rebuilt previous concept with backend and relational data storage.

challenges: Introducing data modeling and backend concerns into an existing concept.
lessonsLearned: Schema design choices have direct UX impact in CRUD-style products.

title: emojis.gg
extended_description: Simple emoji directory allowing one-click copy interaction for fast sharing and communication workflows.
architecture: Client-side emoji listing and clipboard interaction.
Bootstrap UI shell with direct interaction affordances.
features: One-click emoji copy for desktop and mobile.
Fast lookup and scrolling-friendly list presentation.

timeline.details: Implemented lightweight utility with instant copy actions.

challenges: Maintaining responsiveness with large emoji datasets.
lessonsLearned: Micro-utility products need exceptionally clear interaction feedback.
